name: prev_record_fields
notes: Per-field record time-shift: is_first_tick=false, _pos.x=7, _pos.y=11 → step=(8,13), pos=(8,13); halt=true (8≥3) → effects=Println+Exit. last_results is pinned to ⟨StringResult("done")⟩ so the body's s=match last_results[0] is deterministic — an EMPTY last_results leaves last_results[0] free and Z3 picks an arbitrary StringResult (observed "w"), violating the determinism rule. Pinning a concrete StringResult fixes the printed string without changing the pos model (pos doesn't read last_results).
